={
  "plan_tier": "free",

  "priority_support": false,

}

={
  "user_email": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.email }}",

  "event_type": "subscription_cancelled_voluntary",
  "plan_tier": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.planTier }}",
  "cancellation_reason": "voluntary",
  "access_ends_at": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.currentPeriodEnd }}",
  "occurred_at": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.cancelledAt }}"
}
